text:
Fixthebugwithtiste
with the old hardcoded "PolyShopping"this was fine,but a long backend-supplied title has nothing to stop it-it wraps to multiple lines （inflating the header height) or squeezes the nav links,breaking the layout.(The Footer is unaffected -there the title sits its own grid cell and wrapping is harmless.)
The fix
src/conponents/Navbar.tsx - constrain the title to a single line that ellipsizes when too long, with the full text available on hover
<Link to="/" title="PolyShopping" className="inline-block text-2xl font-bold text-indigo-6oe ar-8 max-w-[2o8px]truncate align-middle
data-testid="navbar-title"
PolyShopping
max-w-[2ooox]>the cap the ellipsis kicks in at truncate → overflow-hidden text-ellipsis whitespace-nowrap (no wrapping,"-"on overflow)
title attribute →full title on hover, so nothing is lost align-middle →keeps it vertically aligned with the nav after the display change inline-block an anchorisinline by default and wouldignore max-width/truncate withoutit
Verification
npm run build（tsc +vite build clean)
auto mode on (shift+tab to cycle)- gh auth login poly-frontend-93df5cb0 git:（fix-the-bug-with-title-1edeacf8)x[0pus 4.8（1M context)]
PreNoes
ocr_reason: Readable code-and-notes slide with a short title and dense body text.
